title: peltopus cubitalis
intro: Peltopus cubitalis, also known as "water caltrop" or "water chestnut," is a type of aquatic plant that belongs to the family Trapa. It is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Peltopus cubitalis include reducing swelling and pain, as well as aiding in the treatment of various ailments such as fever and digestive issues. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
